query:
-- 查询这些疑似脏数据账号的详细信息
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.phone as userPhone,
  u.isActive,
  u.createdAt,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.name) as roles
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.userId
LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.roleId = r.id
WHERE u.id IN (16028537, 16028538, 16028539, 16028540, 16028541, 16028542, 16028543, 16028544)
GROUP BY u.id
ORDER BY u.id;
